scripts.minto_thesis: Voicecare.ai stops your clinic from losing patients by answering calls 24/7 without hold times.

hook.text: Missing patients? Your phone's the culprit.
hook.visual_suggestion: A phone ringing on a desk, unanswered.

scene_1.text: After-hours calls go unanswered. Patients find another clinic.
scene_1.visual_suggestion: A frustrated patient hanging up, dialing a competitor.

scene_2.text: AI voice doesn't replace staff. It handles 62% of unneeded calls.
scene_2.visual_suggestion: Split screen: AI handling routine inquiries vs. staff managing complex issues.

scene_3.text: Patient calls -> AI answers -> Books or escalates in 45 seconds.
scene_3.visual_suggestion: Animated call flow showing AI interaction.

scene_4.text: Clinics reduced no-shows by 40% in 90 days using Voicecare.ai.
scene_4.visual_suggestion: Graph showing decline in no-shows over 90 days.

scene_5.text: In 2026, patient wait times will be obsolete. Get ahead now.
scene_5.visual_suggestion: Futuristic clinic with efficient patient flow.

cta.text: Book a 15-minute demo today at voicecare.ai/demo.
cta.visual_suggestion: Link and website displayed with a 'Book Now' button.

scripts.topic: AI Agent Demo: New Patient Intake Scheduling Guide (2026)
scripts.minto_thesis: AI intake scheduling boosts efficiency by handling non-human tasks, enhancing patient and staff experience.

hook.text: You're missing 30% of new patients. Here's why!

scene_1.text: Missed calls and long wait times frustrate potential patients. They move on.
scene_1.visual_suggestion: Frustrated patient on hold, then hanging up.

scene_2.text: Enter AI scheduling: it streamlines intake without overwhelming staff.
scene_2.visual_suggestion: Animated AI interface working alongside happy staff.
scene_2.pyramid_role: key argument 1 â€” strongest supporting idea

scene_3.text: It manages routine tasks. AI books, confirms, and updates fast.
scene_3.visual_suggestion: Step-by-step process: 'Call -> AI books -> Confirmation sent.'

scene_4.text: One clinic cut intake times by 60% in 3 months.
scene_4.visual_suggestion: Graph showing time reduction over three months.

scene_5.text: In 2026, efficient clinics won’t make patients wait. Be one of them.

cta.text: See it in action. Book your free 15-min demo now!
